case_title: WAWANESA INSURANCE COMPANY VS. BRIAN A CALLAHAN et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WAWANESA INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED JUL-25-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CALLAHAN, BRIAN A
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-01-2002 CONTINUED TO JAN-03-2003 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
